section.heading: Duration of military protective orders

content.p: A military protective order issued by a military commander shall remain in effect until such time as the military commander terminates the order or issues a replacement order.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 110–417, [div. A], title V, § 561(a), Oct. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 4470; amended Pub. L. 111–84, div. A, title X, § 1073(a)(16), Oct. 28, 2009, 123 Stat. 2473.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2009—Pub. L. 111–84 made technical amendment to section catchline.
